evals.prompt: What's at risk in PD right now?
evals.expected_output: Pulls tasks across all SJ SKIN PD projects and returns the Job 1 highlights-only format (🔴 AT RISK/BLOCKED, 🟡 STALE 7+ days no update, ⚠️ OVERDUE), pulling in Job 8's proactive stale-flagging rather than a generic status dump. Says so in one line if nothing qualifies rather than padding.
expectations: The output uses the three named categories (AT RISK/BLOCKED, STALE, OVERDUE) rather than an unstructured project list
STALE items are specifically identified as 7+ days with no update, not just 'old'
The output stays highlights-only (no padding/narration) and says so in one line if a category is empty
No Asana write is made or proposed — this is a read-only rollup

evals.prompt: Move the Fig lip treatment to Signed Approvals
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as a Job 2 Formula Tracker stage-gate move and previews the full atomic side-effect per Job 3 (IL Review Gate auto-fire): the stage move itself, IL Status flipping to 'Pending IL Review', and a new inbound task being created in SJS Regulatory Management with the '[IL Review Pending — claims-il-and-label-keeper]' prefix — all as one Rule 1 confirmation preview, not executed until approved.
expectations: The stage move is identified as going to Signed Approvals specifically (not just 'a stage move')
The IL Review Gate side-effect is explicitly previewed as part of the same action — IL Status flip to Pending IL Review
The regulatory inbound task with the '[IL Review Pending — claims-il-and-label-keeper]' prefix is mentioned as part of the atomic preview
The output frames this as a confirmation preview per Rule 1, not as an already-executed change
No Asana write is made before confirmation
